evals.prompt: The hero section feels generic. Rewrite the HeroSection component to feel more editorial and premium — bigger serif headline, the rotating phrases should be bolder, and the gallery photo labels should overlap the photos slightly. Keep it light/cream, not dark.
evals.expected_output: Updated HeroSection in sections.tsx with Playfair Display headline, bolder rotating phrase display, and photo labels with absolute positioning overlapping the photo. All using CSS vars from globals.css, no hardcoded colours.

evals.prompt: Add a new section to the homepage called ReframSection that goes right after the hero. It should have a bold stat callout: '€440/mo in Bali vs €1,100/mo in Amsterdam' displayed in a large editorial style with two columns — left column Bali, right column Amsterdam — with a simple 'vs' divider between them. Light cream background. Add the copy to data/homepage.ts first.
evals.expected_output: New reframe data block in data/homepage.ts, new ReframeSection component in sections.tsx with two-column stat layout using Playfair Display for the numbers, referenced in home-page.tsx in the correct position.

evals.prompt: The CostsSection has a comparison callout showing Bali vs Amsterdam costs but it looks plain. Make it a proper feature card with forest green border on the left side, the Bali total number large in Playfair serif, and a small 'vs Netherlands avg' comparison line underneath. Should feel editorial not like a pricing table.
evals.expected_output: Updated CostsSection or its sub-component in sections.tsx with styled comparison card. Playfair number, forest-green left border accent, CSS vars throughout. No hardcoded hex values.

evals.prompt: The FAQ section accordion doesn't animate when opening/closing. Add a smooth height transition to the FAQ answers so they expand and collapse with a 0.3s ease animation. The icon should also rotate 45deg when open.
evals.expected_output: FaqSection in sections.tsx updated with CSS height transition (max-height technique or details/summary with animation) and icon rotation on open state. Uses transition with ease timing.

evals.prompt: I want to add a photo strip between the TestimonialsSection and the ResourcesSection — a full-width horizontal row of 6 community photos from the /images/ folder that scrolls slightly on mouse move (parallax effect). The photos should be slightly overlapping with rounded corners.
evals.expected_output: New PhotoStrip component added to sections.tsx, inserted in home-page.tsx between Testimonials and Resources. Uses CSS for overlap layout, border-radius, optional JS parallax on mousemove. Images use next/image with loading=lazy.
